provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Matimela Act.

provisions.title: Application
provisions.content:
2. Application
This Act shall not apply within the area of a city or township.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Establishment of matimela facilities
provisions.content:
4. Establishment of matimela facilities
A council may, by resolution, acquire or establish any kraal, enclosure or ranch as a matimela facility for the purposes of this Act.

provisions.title: Matimela officers
provisions.content:
5. Matimela officers
(1) Subject to the provisions of the Public Service Act (Cap. 26:01), a council may appoint such number of matimela officers as may be necessary for the purposes of this Act.

any stray animal and any animal which, having been a stray animal, continues to be matimela by virtue of section 15
